## Lost Pets Gate Checklist (required for Lost Pets-related changes)

Mark items as completed (`[x]`) if your PR touches Lost Pets scope:
- backend lost pets routes/models/migrations/tests
- frontend lost pets pages/components
- promotion payments / ads budget / moderation-abuse / hotspot delivery

- [ ] Lost Pets Smoke CI passed (`Lost Pets Smoke` workflow)
- [ ] Reviewed `artifacts/lost-pets-smoke-summary.md` (or sticky PR comment) and confirmed status `passed`
- [ ] Payment/anti-fraud changes reviewed for idempotency and abuse controls (if applicable)
- [ ] Personal data/privacy checks done (phone visibility, geolocation handling, consent boundaries)
- [ ] Legal/compliance review done for RU 2026 scope (152-FZ/54-FZ related changes, if applicable)
